SKILL CORRECTION (norwegian-rights SKILL.md) — ATTEMPTED via Edit, PERMISSION-GATED in this interactive session (real here; matches prior runs' observation). Durable, well-evidenced finding to transcribe (flagged carried-forward by the grader, seen across ≥3 runs): Champions League (incl. qualifying) = TV 2 Play through 2026/27; Europa League + Conference League (incl. qualifying) = VIAPLAY through 2031 — CORRECTS the skill's old 'Champions League / Europa League → TV 2 Play' line. Source: nettavisen.no/sport/viaplay-bekrefter-ny-fotballavtale; re-confirmed 2026-07-22 via Brann's Conference qualifier vs Universitatea Cluj on tvkampen ('Viaplay sender oppgjøret direkte'). NB a Norwegian club's specific qualifying HOME leg can sit with a local holder (Bodø/Glimt's CL qualifying home legs historically Avisa Nordland + Direktesport) → verify per match.
